channel.title: BBC Weather - Forecast for Cardiff, GB

image.title: BBC Weather - Forecast for Cardiff, GB

item.title: Tonight: Light Cloud, Minimum Temperature: 14°C (57°F)
item.description: Minimum Temperature: 14°C (57°F), Wind Direction: westerly, Wind Speed: 7mph, Visibility: Very Good, Pressure: 1025mb, Humidity: 74%, UV Risk: 3, Pollution: Low, Sunset: 21:34 BST

item.title: Tuesday: Light Rain, Minimum Temperature: 13°C (55°F) Maximum Temperature: 20°C (69°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 20°C (69°F), Minimum Temperature: 13°C (55°F), Wind Direction: south-westerly, Wind Speed: 12mph, Visibility: Good, Pressure: 1022mb, Humidity: 71%, UV Risk: 4, Pollution: Low, Sunrise: 04:59 BST, Sunset: 21:33 BST

item.title: Wednesday: Sunny Intervals, Minimum Temperature: 15°C (60°F) Maximum Temperature: 22°C (72°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 22°C (72°F), Minimum Temperature: 15°C (60°F), Wind Direction: westerly, Wind Speed: 14mph, Visibility: Very Good, Pressure: 1026mb, Humidity: 68%, UV Risk: 6, Pollution: Low, Sunrise: 05:00 BST, Sunset: 21:33 BST
